claim_boundaries: M43 reverse-engineers the visible baryonic platform needed for a durable mature disk endpoint.
Do not reverse-engineer the dark halo, BDVR distribution, reservoir field, or missing-mass profile in this branch.
Velocity residuals are outcomes only and are not maturity inputs.
Quality remains separate from physical baryonic maturity; inclination and endpoint reliability are not used as a physical maturity substitute.
Missing resolved dynamical-organization and star-formation observables are reported as requirements, not fabricated.
UGC07125 remains quarantined and measurement-limited, not a clean scalar object or juvenile prototype.
No mature velocity law changed and no manuscript rewrite is performed.
